titles.en: Leprosy as a divine curse avoided by the faithful
Leprosy as a divine curse avoided by the faithful

segments: وَ بِهَذَا اَلْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ‌ ع اَلْبَرَصُ شِبْهُ اَللَّعْنَةِ لاَ يَكُونُ فِينَا وَ لاَ فِي ذُرِّيَّتِنَا وَ لاَ فِي شِيعَتِنَا .
arabic.text: وَ بِهَذَا اَلْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ‌ ع اَلْبَرَصُ شِبْهُ اَللَّعْنَةِ لاَ يَكُونُ فِينَا وَ لاَ فِي ذُرِّيَّتِنَا وَ لاَ فِي شِيعَتِنَا .

segments: (The same previous series of relaters)… Abu Abdullah (a) said: Leprosy is semi-curse. Neither we, nor will our descendants and Shia be affected by leprosy.
en.badr-shahin.text: (The same previous series of relaters)… Abu Abdullah (a) said: Leprosy is semi-curse. Neither we, nor will our descendants and Shia be affected by leprosy.
